name: todolist
description: Three-layer todo list application: React SPA + Express BFF + DDD backend service

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix bff && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test:all: npm test --prefix backend && npm test --prefix bff && npm test --prefix frontend
scripts.validate: npm run install:all && npm run test:all && npm run build:frontend
